{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231844263FA4BCC10AF1FB8045CA"}"},"total":3524},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7371813449661416254","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很是不错的一本书
大男主许行丰很厉害，很勤奋，虽然没有金手指但是他有现代社会的知识储备，而且还能记得住。很是厉害了
本文应该不算有女主吧，徐云容只能算是男主之妻，不能算女主。本文是一个大男主文，搞事业搞事业，感情线不多哈，事业粉的可以冲。
评分有点低了，不应该才9分，我觉得可以9.5的。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1716386380,"group_id":"7155287533067177001","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"只想静静地看小说。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6iIN9Ge35CIEX3Y7+ursLU7qqU4QBOhFaWF/7DQOVG6","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/021fdd86bc064a9daf6549579ee9a3d7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794976&x-signature=k1TjNpAIqIHj2W4MPLPgmx1LMwk%3D","user_id":"3434496903100413","user_name":"🌸•如愿以偿•🌸"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3434496903100413","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1748133627,"is_worn":false,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7155287533067177001","book_info":{"abstract":"【无金手指+无空间+家庭温馨+无奇葩】
【男主基本靠自己勤奋一步一步往上走的】
【男主专一，女主会出现得比较晚，前面科举后面官场】
【此书不强行降智，不圣母不白莲花】
21世纪县城公务员的许行丰，突然胎穿成为农家子，哥哥们都夭折了，作为家中独苗苗，承担了家族兴旺的重担，自认为无法受种田之苦，选择走上了科举之路，本只想考个童生，改善家庭生活，蓦然回首，却已位于无人之巅。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9da9d766a848d9dbee9c3f3e9450b753","author":"朝暮倾卿","author_id":"","book_id":"7155287533067177001","book_name":"没有系统？我照样考状元当首辅","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7155287556890821156","read_count":"13604","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1000099"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"478","tags":"历史古代,乡村,历史,穿越,架空","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1182fd80b4bf741796604207db2660c8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779446666&x-signature=ALeJ37typ62TZep6XcZOSjMWBMs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"98508764490","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"633"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231844263FA4BCC10AF1FB8045CA"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读34小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":108820,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":
